findings.title: Venue over capacity risk
findings.why: The worst-case guest list projection (including pending and plus-ones) exceeds the venue's capacity of 60. Current estimates show a potential 61 attendees.
findings.do: Review pending RSVPs and unclear plus-ones; consider contacting guests to confirm numbers or adjust guest list.

findings.title: Overdue RSVPs
findings.why: Several households including 'Mizrahi Family', 'Friedman', 'Goldstein', 'Sharabi Family', 'Dahan Family', 'Malka Family', 'Biton Family', 'Ohana Family' have not responded by the RSVP deadline.
findings.do: Follow-up with these households to confirm attendance and any plus-ones.

findings.title: Ambiguous Plus-Ones
findings.why: Guests 'Friedman' and 'Goldstein' have been allowed plus-ones, but names have not been provided.
findings.do: Contact these households to clarify if a plus-one will attend.

findings.title: Impossible Attending Count
findings.why: The 'Levi Family' has a recorded attending count of 6, exceeding their party size of 2.
findings.do: Correct this data entry error to ensure the headcount is accurate.

findings.title: Confirmed but zero attendance count
findings.why: The 'Peretz' household is marked as confirmed with an attending count of 0, creating a contradiction.
findings.do: Clarify the actual number of attendees for 'Peretz' to ensure correct calculations.
